required_refs.description: 3/4 portrait, neutral expression, photoreal DAZ3D CGI, head and shoulders, long golden-brown box braids reaching mid-back with a few amber-beaded accents at random braid tips (tied back in a single low ponytail at baseline), dark brown eyes, rich dark brown Nigerian skin, age 24, strikingly beautiful with elegant features and full lips, vogue-cover glamour lighting, neutral grey backdrop

Composite showing Amaka at tier 2, tier 4, tier 6, tier 7, and tier 8 side-by-side, full body fronts, photoreal DAZ3D CGI, with each tier matching the canonical lineup figure for that tier (tiers 2-5 in black dance wear, tiers 6-8 in gold-trim ochre warrior wear), neutral grey backdrop
Tier-2 Amaka in black dance wear shown front / three-quarter / profile / back in a 2x2 grid composite, neutral grey backdrop, photoreal DAZ3D, braids tied back
Black athletic crop top + black high-waist dance leggings + barefoot + gold ankle bracelet on left ankle, shown front and back side-by-side on tier-2 Amaka, neutral grey backdrop, photoreal DAZ3D

Traditional Nigerian-inspired warrior wear — gold-trim crop top in deep ochre + deep ochre wrap skirt + gold arm bands on both upper arms + barefoot + gold ankle bracelet on left ankle, shown front and back side-by-side on tier-6 Amaka (mid-peak proportions for the turnaround), neutral grey backdrop, photoreal DAZ3D

Wide establishing shot of a modern dance studio interior — full-wall mirror along one wall, polished honey-wood sprung dance floor, white-painted ballet barre at hip height along the opposite wall, mid-afternoon natural light streaming through tall windows, water bottle and gray towel on the floor near the barre, white walls with one accent wall in burnt-sienna ochre, slim steel ceiling lights, no character in frame, photoreal CGI
